rootCauseLabel: Part 2 bridge implemented only in resolveRecipeLineOperationalCost — not executed by aggregation/replay engine-total path

summary.implementationCorrectDetail: recipeLineCostFieldsWhenInvoiceVolumeOverCatalogCountable works in resolveRecipeLineOperationalCost (€4.86); not wired into computeRecipeLineCostEur / computeRecipeTotalCostEur

phase2_inputComparison.firstDivergence: After resolveRecipeLineOperationalCost returns €4.86, computeRecipeLineCostEur uses enriched ml fields → null

liveAuditRerun.reason: import.meta.env undefined in child modules when trigger logging enabled; pre-existing tsx shim gap

phase5_classification.rationale: Part 2 fix is correct and live VL inputs match unit tests, but bridge runs only inside resolveRecipeLineOperationalCost. E2E engine total and list-card summary call computeRecipeLineCostEur on enriched ml fields, so Ginger Beer is excluded (€2.33 vs €7.19). Harness also marks line FAIL by comparing actual bridged cost to expected unbridged cost.

phase6_foundation.reason: Even with line-level €4.86, E2E recipe PASS requires engine total = sum of lines; computeRecipeTotalCostEur must also apply bridge. Prosciutto/history blockers remain for full foundation green.
phase6_foundation.foundationGreenIfGingerFullyFixed: NO — partial; recipe costing pillar could reach 12/12 but foundation has separate Prosciutto blocker and sync artifacts
